_meta.description: Full-fiscal-year health premium by insurer and carrier type, from the GI Council Segment-wise Report's Health Portfolio sheet. One row per fiscal_year × entity × carrier_group: tracked insurers (health retail / group / government / overseas-medical / grand total) plus aggregates — SAHI, GENERAL and INDUSTRY as printed; PSUs (sum of the 4 public-sector general insurers), Private (GENERAL − PSUs) and Others-retail (INDUSTRY retail − the named insurers) derived by exact arithmetic over rows printed in the same official table (each row's `basis` field says which). For each FY the newest GIC statement wins: a later report's restated prior-year comparative supersedes the year's own earlier edition. Missing is never zero.
_meta.notes: Filled by scripts/ingest/ingest-gicouncil-segment-annual.ts (npm run ingest:gic-segment-annual). gicouncil.in 403s datacenter IPs: live fetch needs an in-region run or INGEST_FETCH_PROXY; otherwise drop the official XLSX into data/raw/gicouncil/segment-annual/ — only March / 'final segment' editions count as full fiscal years.
